track_record.frame_line: Observational — settlement tracking; registered verdict metrics govern.
track_record.visibility_markdown:
## M-1 Outcomes

Observational — settlement tracking; registered verdict metric is excess CLV.
Outcome denominator basis: PA-valid settled player-market rows only; zero-PA and absent-boxscore rows are VOID.
Retroactive-grading note: CLV sign is rendered from captured closes where available; this is report visibility only.

### 2026-07-17 settlements

| Market | Picks | Hits | Hit rate | Avg implied prob at pick |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Doubles | 49 | 10 | 20.4% | 19.2% |
| Hits | 66 | 28 | 42.4% | 53.0% |
| HR | 36 | 4 | 11.1% | 15.6% |
| Total bases | 73 | 24 | 32.9% | 47.2% |

HR subgroup (secondary only; no HR-specific verdict): matched-close coverage=36/36 (100.0%); unmatched=0.

#### CLV-sign split

| Market | CLV bucket | Picks | Hits | Hit rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Doubles | negative/flat CLV | 37 | 9 | 24.3% |
| Doubles | positive CLV | 12 | 1 | 8.3% |
| Hits | negative/flat CLV | 43 | 18 | 41.9% |
| Hits | positive CLV | 21 | 9 | 42.9% |
| HR | negative/flat CLV | 10 | 1 | 10.0% |
| HR | positive CLV | 26 | 3 | 11.5% |
| Total bases | negative/flat CLV | 41 | 12 | 29.3% |
| Total bases | positive CLV | 31 | 11 | 35.5% |

Positive-CLV-and-hit names: Otto Lopez — Doubles 0.5 @ DraftKings; Ben Rice — Hits 0.5 @ theScore Bet; Brandon Nimmo — Hits 0.5 @ BetMGM; Casey Schmitt — Hits 0.5 @ betPARX; Curtis Mead — Hits 1.5 @ theScore Bet; Dylan Crews — Hits 0.5 @ DraftKings; Griffin Conine — Hits 0.5 @ DraftKings; Max Muncy — Hits 0.5 @ BetMGM; Michael Conforto — Hits 0.5 @ Hard Rock Bet; Munetaka Murakami — Hits 0.5 @ Bally Bet; Bryce Eldridge — HR 0.5 @ betPARX; JJ Wetherholt — HR 0.5 @ Hard Rock Bet (OH); Lane Thomas — HR 0.5 @ betPARX; Ben Rice — Total bases 1.5 @ Bally Bet; Bryce Eldridge — Total bases 0.5 @ BetMGM; CJ Abrams — Total bases 1.5 @ theScore Bet; Colson Montgomery — Total bases 1.5 @ Bally Bet; Drake Baldwin — Total bases 1.5 @ BetMGM; Dylan Crews — Total bases 1.5 @ Bovada; Griffin Conine — Total bases 0.5 @ Hard Rock Bet (OH); Otto Lopez — Total bases 1.5 @ Bovada; Seiya Suzuki — Total bases 1.5 @ Bovada; Shea Langeliers — Total bases 1.5 @ BetMGM; Tyler Soderstrom — Total bases 1.5 @ Bally Bet.
